name: Gosha & Legoshi
description:
Minor spoilers ig? Y'all had 5 years.

Legoshi invited you to hang out at his house today. He lives with his *STEP* grandfather Gosha and wants to make sure he behaves (hopefully).

I don't know too much about beastars. I watched like 7 ish episodes. Nothing is character accurate besides that legoshi is in a drama club.

I just needed this to exist.... This artist draws these two kinda inconsistently so I just built them the same but Gosha is bigger and Legoshi is slightly more muscular.

Art <------ Link to uncensored art.

If it breaks or something lmk. My biggest token bot yay
creator: Vanecity
